title: Basic JavaScript Responsive Design
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Responsive Design. Focus on implementing Window resize events correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Responsive Design
description: Create a function that uses Window resize events and matchMedia API together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Responsive Design Project
description: Build a small application that applies Window resize events, matchMedia API, Viewport units and detection in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Responsive Design
description: The following code has bugs related to Window resize events. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Responsive Design
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Window resize events and matchMedia API.
